description: Indulge in the joy of the holiday season with our delightful bakery-themed email template. Perfect for seasonal promotions, this design is brimming with hand-drawn cupcakes, gingerbread houses, and special Christmas treats. It's an ideal choice for those in the food and beverage industry looking to spread some festive cheer. The template is beautifully adorned with intricate snowflakes, capturing the essence of a white Christmas. Whether you're announcing your Christmas menu or sharing a holiday discount, this template ensures your message is delivered in the sweetest way possible. Its festive design is not only relevant to events and Christmas but also encapsulates the warmth of the holiday season. Make your emails as irresistible as your holiday treats with this charming template.
short_description: Delight in our bakery-themed email template, perfect for seasonal promotions. Adorned with hand-drawn Christmas treats like cupcakes and gingerbread houses, it's ideal for the food and beverage industry. Share your holiday menu or discounts with a festive design featuring intricate snowflakes. Make your emails irresistible with this charming holiday template.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
